Restaurant_Receipt_May2024: Proof of purchase establishing that the plaintiff was a customer at Central East Asia Cuisine on the date of the incident and ordered the specific dish in question.
Dental_Xrays_and_Diagnostic_Notes: Medical records from the initial dentist visit showing the fractured tooth and the clinical determination that an extraction was necessary due to the injury.
Dental_Implant_Invoices_and_Receipts: Itemized billing statements confirming the $4500 cost of the dental implant and related procedures, serving as the primary documentation for economic damages.
Witness_Declarations_Friends: Written statements from the two individuals who were dining with the plaintiff, corroborating the timeline of the injury and the immediate report to restaurant staff.
Incident_Date_Photographs: Any photos taken of the food, the bone fragment, or the damaged tooth immediately following the incident to visually document the cause of the injury.
Staff_Interaction_Summary: A detailed account or log of the conversation with the restaurant staff who apologized, which can be used to establish the restaurant's awareness of the hazard.
